items.name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, complete packaging
🖤Super mini Duchess bag 3-compartment🖤
Dɪᴏʀ ʟᴀᴅʏ Mɪᴄʀᴏ Bᴀɢ
So small and cute! Super mini black and gold combination is simple, elegant, and imposing. The bag embodies Dior's profound insight into refinement and beauty. Crafted from lambskin with quilting stitching, featuring the iconic silhouette and a charm to elevate the style. Mini size, fits various small personal items, the ideal companion for evening wear.
Size:12*10*5cm.
Style No.:6601

🖤Super mini Diana Bag 3-compartment🖤
Dior Lady Micro Bag
So cute and tiny! The super mini black and gold combination is simple, elegant, and imposing. The bag embodies Dior's profound insight into refinement and beauty. Model: 0856
Dimensions: 12*10*5cm.

items.name_cn:
Top-tier factory, complete packaging
New Dior Lady D-Joy 🌟 Calfskin Series
This Lady D-Joy handbag interprets Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. An elegant and classic style, meticulously crafted from nude pink calfskin, paired with light gold-finished metal 'D.I.O.R.' charms to elevate the style, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a removable chain strap and an adjustable, removable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily looks.
Size 22cm
9240
